calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Francisco, G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Joseph Stinson, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Phillip Woods.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 24, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff John Stewasrt Company, and against defendant Phillip Woods as follows:

Plaintiff John Stewart Company shall recover from defendant Phillip Woods Past Due Rent in the amount of $641.00, Holdover Damages in the amount of 388.92 and costs in the amount of 365.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $1,394.92.

Plaintiff John Stewart Company is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 51 Sixth Street, #302, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Off Calendar
